hero.description: Plan smarter, reduce downtime, and keep every project properly staffed without the guesswork with BuilderTek resource management.

financialControl.title: Seamless Construction Resource Planning Across Teams
financialControl.description: One system to manage labor, crews, and availability across projects, built for real-world construction complexities.
features: BuilderTek Resource Management tool replaces reactive scheduling and disconnected tracking with a centralized, real-time view of workforce and equipment utilization.
Designed specifically for construction workflows, it connects schedules, tasks, and project timelines, so resource decisions are based on accurate data, not assumptions.

section.title: Resource Management Tool for Construction Operations
section.subtitle: Plan, allocate, and track crews and equipment across construction projects with real-time visibility. Stay optimized, stay aligned, and keep downtime to a minimum.

features.title: Crew & Labor Allocation
features.description: Assign crews to tasks and projects based on availability, skill sets, and schedules.

features.title: Equipment & Asset Visibility
features.description: Track where equipment is assigned, in use, or available across jobs.

features.title: Availability & Utilization Tracking
features.description: Identify overbooked or underutilized resources in real time.

features.title: Schedule-Driven Resource Planning
features.description: Align labor and equipment directly to project schedules and milestones.

features.title: Cross-Project Resource View
features.description: See workforce and equipment distribution across multiple projects.

features.title: Audit-Ready Assignment History
features.description: Maintain a complete record of resource assignments and changes.

cards.title: Stronger Project Coordination
cards.description: By linking resources directly to schedules, BuilderTek ensures field and office teams stay aligned.

section.title: Simplify Team Management & Bring Structure to
section.description: Gain control over labor and equipment allocation with BuilderTek Resource Management, designed to keep projects staffed, efficient, and on schedule.

faq.title: FAQs
faq.subtitle: Explore Answers to Frequently Asked Questions about BuilderTek.

items.question: Can BuilderTek manage both labor and equipment resources?
items.answer: Yes. BuilderTek supports tracking and planning for both workforce and equipment resources for on-site and off-site resources.

items.question: Does Resource Management integrate with project schedules?
items.answer: Absolutely. The BuilderTek resource management tool can be directly aligned with project schedules and milestones.

items.question: Can I view resource availability across multiple projects?
items.answer: Can I view resource availability across multiple projects?

items.question: Is BuilderTek Resource Management suitable for large teams?
items.answer: Yes. It scales to support projects of all sizes and shapes- from commercial contracts to small-scale remodelling projects.

items.question: Can historical resource data be reviewed for planning?
items.answer: Yes. You can easily view, update, or add assignment history and utilization reports to improve future workforce planning.
